text:
そろそろ浮かれても
いいよね？　いいよね？

そんじゃ、遠慮なく……
おっつかれさまー！

いやあ、見事な連携だったねー！
アークス一の名コンビ誕生！
とでも言っちゃおうかな？

うそうそ、冗談だよ。
まだまだあたしはなまくらだし
これからもよろしくね

Okay, NOW we can get all excited
and celebrate, right?

You and me, we were like two parts of the
same whole out there! I think we might be
one of the greatest duos ARKS has ever seen!

Hah! Nah, I'm just kidding. I'm still good for
next to nothing out there myself. But still! I
hope we can get out there together again.
